inputs.label: Micrograms (µg)

inputs.label: Number of Units

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités (ex. comprimés, gélules) dans le lot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades (ej. comprimidos, cápsulas) en el lote.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktif bileşenin saflık veya tahlil yüzdesi

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety or overage factor to adjust total amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety or overage factor to adjust total amount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam miktarı ayarlamak için güvenlik veya fazlalık faktörü
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherheits- oder Überbestandsfaktor zur Anpassung der Gesamtmenge.

businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad o sobrante para ajustar la cantidad total.
